shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -300

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar > /tmp/hello-java.log 2>&1 & echo $! && sleep 8 && printf '
--- root ---
' && curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/' && printf '
--- name ---
' && curl -sS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20Alice%20%20' && kill $! && wait $! 2>/dev/null; echo $? && printf '
--- log tail ---
' && tail -50 /tmp/hello-java.log
